segments.text: This Corrin's been looking really different from the rest!
segments.original_text: 今まで他のカムイと違ってとても面白いですよね

segments.text: If the active frames catch, that's gonna be huge, but...
segments.original_text: 持続で当たるとえらいことになりますが
メテオにはならないが
崖の上がりを見ている

full_text: This Corrin's been looking really different from the rest! So... Oh! That nair as well! If the active frames catch, that's gonna be huge, but... It's not a meteor, but... Made the recovery! Watching the ledge getup

corrections.original: 今まで他の神威と違って
corrections.corrected: 今まで他のカムイと違って

corrections.rule: Move abbreviation: クエネ→空N (neutral air)

corrections.original: かわいい仕上がりを見ている
corrections.corrected: 崖の上がりを見ている
corrections.rule: Garbled transcription: かわいい仕上がり→崖の上がり
